name: Moving
title: AI Tools for Moving Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for moving companies — quote moves fast, follow up on every estimate, and keep the calendar full. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: Moving is a quoting race — customers gather three estimates and book fast. We build the tools that quote quickly, follow up well, and keep your trucks booked through the season.
drains: Quote requests that need a fast estimate before the customer books
Estimating move size from inventory descriptions
Estimates that go quiet while the customer compares movers
Seasonal spikes overwhelming the office every summer

tools.title: Move-quote assistant
tools.body: Every inquiry gets an instant reply, the move scoped — home size, distance, inventory, date — and an estimate or a survey booked, so prospects don't drift to whoever quoted first.

tools.title: Estimate follow-up assistant
tools.body: Every open estimate gets a well-timed follow-up while the customer compares movers, so you win jobs on attentiveness, not just the lowest bid.

tools.title: Move-day prep assistant
tools.body: Booked customers get clear prep reminders and a confirmation; after the move, a review request. Smoother moves, more reviews.

tools.title: Morning dispatch brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's moves, crew and truck assignments, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A moving company in a busy summer season.
cases.before: The summer rush outpaced the office; quotes were slow and leads went cold.
cases.after: Every inquiry answered instantly with an estimate or a booked survey.
cases.impact: Representative result: more of the seasonal rush converted before competitors replied.

cases.context: A mover losing jobs to comparison shoppers.
cases.before: Estimates went out and the company lost track during the customer's comparison phase.
cases.after: Every open estimate followed up automatically while the customer decided.
cases.impact: Representative result: a meaningful lift in close rate against other movers.

faq.a: Yes. It scopes the move — home size, distance, inventory, date — and gives an estimate from your pricing, or books an in-home or video survey for larger moves.

faq.q: How does it help against comparison shoppers?
faq.a: Moving customers gather multiple quotes. The follow-up tool keeps your estimate in front of them with a friendly, well-timed nudge, so you win on responsiveness.

faq.q: Will it work with my software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of whatever you use to manage leads, estimates, and dispatch.
